common.private_footer: Private by design. No tracking, no external assets.
language.label: Language
landing.title: Private feedback
landing.heading: Uninstall feedback without tracking.
landing.subtitle: KoalaBye helps developers collect anonymous, privacy-first feedback when users uninstall an extension or app.
landing.private.title: Private
landing.private.text: No analytics scripts, no fingerprinting, no IP storage, and no external CDNs.
landing.small.title: Lightweight
landing.small.text: A small Go service with server-rendered pages, SQLite, and Docker-friendly deployment.
landing.yours.title: Yours
landing.yours.text: MIT licensed, self-hostable, free forever, and built without billing code.
setup.title: Create the Instance Owner
setup.subtitle: This account controls the whole instance. There are no default credentials. A private starter organization is created for you.
setup.error.expired: Your form expired. Please try again.
setup.error.invalid_identity: Enter a display name and a 3-40 character username using letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.
setup.error.create_failed: Could not create the owner. The username may already be in use.
auth.login.title: Log in
auth.login.subtitle: Use your KoalaBye username and password.
auth.error.expired: Your form expired. Please try again.
auth.error.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
dashboard.no_organizations: You do not belong to an organization yet.
dashboard.organization_explanation: An organization is a private team space for campaigns, members, and safety limits. Self-hosted instances can keep everything inside their own infrastructure.
dashboard.campaigns_text: Create a campaign for each extension, app, or cancellation flow where you want anonymous feedback.
dashboard.selfhost_text: KoalaBye uses no external analytics or required third-party services.
instance.title: Instance administration
instance.administration_text: Users, organizations, quotas, and moderation tools are prepared for later modules.
error.not_found.title: Page not found
error.forbidden.title: Access denied
error.forbidden.message: You do not have permission to open this page.
error.internal.title: Something went wrong
error.internal.message: Please try again in a moment.
legal.privacy.title: Privacy policy
legal.privacy.text: This legal page is a placeholder for self-hosted or early test deployments. Replace it with legally reviewed text before running a public instance.
legal.imprint.title: Legal notice
legal.imprint.text: This legal page is a placeholder for self-hosted or early test deployments. Replace it with legally reviewed text before running a public instance.
legal.language_notice: Legal pages are currently available in English and German only. English is shown as the fallback.
org.list.title: Your organizations
org.new.title: Create organization
org.name: Name
org.empty_title: Start with a private team space
org.empty: You do not belong to an organization yet.
org.settings_placeholder: Basic organization settings are prepared here. Destructive actions are intentionally deferred.
org.future_campaigns_text: Campaign management will be added in the next product layer.
org.error.invalid: Enter a valid organization name and slug.
org.error.limit: You have reached the instance safety limit for organizations.
org.error.create: The organization could not be created. The slug may already be in use.
members.title: Members
invite.title: Invite codes
invite.shown_once: Copy this code now. It will not be shown again.
invite.copy: Share it manually with the person you want to invite.
invite.limit: Up to %s active invite codes are allowed.
invite.error.limit: The active invite safety limit has been reached.
invite.error.unavailable: This invite is expired, revoked, used up, or otherwise unavailable.
join.title: Join organization
join.existing_required: An existing account is required for this invite.
register.title: Create account
register.disabled: Public registration is disabled on this instance.
register.error.invalid: Enter a valid display name and username.
register.error.password: The password must be at least 12 characters.
register.error.exists: That username or email is already in use.
limits.title: Safety limits
limits.explanation: These limits protect this free instance from abuse and accidental overload. Ask the instance administrator if you need higher limits.
instance.name: Instance name
campaign.title: Campaigns
campaign.list.description: Create and manage feedback collection targets for this organization.
campaign.new.title: Create campaign
campaign.empty: No campaigns are available to you yet.
campaign.empty_explanation: A campaign connects one public feedback page, form, response inbox, and analytics view.
campaign.example.chrome: Chrome or Chromium extension uninstall feedback
campaign.name: Name
campaign.creator: Creator
campaign.disabled: This campaign was disabled by the instance administrator.
campaign.archived.read_only: Archived campaigns are historical and read-only.
campaign.error.invalid: Enter a valid name and a lowercase URL-safe slug.
campaign.error.slug: The campaign could not be saved. This slug may already be used in the organization.
campaign.error.limit: The campaign safety limit has been reached. Contact the instance administrator if you need more.
campaign.limit.message: This free instance's campaign safety limit has been reached. Contact the instance administrator if you need more.
campaign.limit.usage: %d of %d campaign slots are in use. Archived and disabled campaigns still count.
campaign.public_link.future: This link is not live until the public page phase is implemented.
campaign.snippet.title: Browser extension snippet
campaign.snippet.future: Future snippet: it will work after public campaign pages are implemented.
campaign.future.label: Future module
campaign.access.title: Campaign access
campaign.access.implicit: Organization owners and admins always have implicit campaign owner access. Explicit roles grant access to other organization members.
campaign.access.error.member: Only existing organization members can receive campaign access.
campaign.access.error.last_owner: A campaign must retain at least one explicit owner.
campaign.privacy.title: Privacy settings
campaign.privacy.preset_help: Balanced enables optional coarse referrer, browser, and operating-system statistics. Neither preset stores IP addresses or fingerprints people.
campaign.privacy.strict_summary: Strict privacy: optional coarse statistics are disabled.
campaign.privacy.balanced_summary: Balanced privacy: one or more optional coarse statistics are enabled.
campaign.privacy.promise_text: KoalaBye never stores IP addresses, never fingerprints visitors, never stores raw install tokens, and designs public pages to be cookie-free by default.
campaign.privacy.no_raw_token: Raw install tokens are never stored
campaign.privacy.install_token: Use an optional install token for unique counting
campaign.privacy.notice: Show a privacy notice on the public page
campaign.privacy.hash_locked: Install tokens are always protected with HMAC-SHA256 before storage. Raw tokens cannot be enabled.
campaign.public_link.requirements: The page is available while the campaign is active, enabled, and within its visit safety limit.
campaign.snippet.explanation: Use these examples in your extension background script. The optional random token remains local to the extension and is stored by KoalaBye only as an HMAC hash. It helps avoid duplicate counting; it does not identify a person.
campaign.snippet.no_token.title: Simpler example without a token
campaign.snippet.no_token.text: You can omit ?t= entirely. The public page and raw visit counting still work.
campaign.checklist.title: Campaign setup checklist
campaign.checklist.derived: This checklist is calculated from the current campaign. Copying and testing are marked ready when the required settings are in place.
public.footer: Powered by free and open-source KoalaBye.
public.heading: Optional feedback
public.intro: We'd love to know how we can improve. This form is completely optional and privacy-friendly.
public.privacy.title: Your privacy
public.privacy.text: We do not use external analytics, fingerprint you, or store your IP address. Raw install tokens are never stored.
public.privacy.strict: Only privacy-strict visit counts are enabled for this campaign.
public.privacy.balanced: This campaign may collect an optional referrer domain and coarse browser or operating-system family, never full URLs or raw user agents.
public.form.title: Share optional feedback
public.form.placeholder: This campaign is not collecting feedback questions yet.
public.unavailable.title: Feedback page unavailable
public.unavailable.generic: This feedback page is currently unavailable.
public.unavailable.quota: This free KoalaBye instance has reached an abuse-prevention safety limit. Please try again later.
form.title: Form builder
form.description: Build the simple feedback form shown on this campaign's public page.
form.empty: This campaign does not collect feedback yet.
form.label: Label or title
form.option.label: Option label
form.option.error: Enter a unique lowercase value using letters, numbers, and hyphens.
form.error.invalid: Check the field values and try again.
form.error.save: The field could not be saved.
responses.title: Responses
responses.empty: No feedback has been submitted yet.
responses.privacy: Responses contain no stored IP address, raw user agent, or raw install token.
public.privacy.free_text: Feedback is anonymous. Please do not include personal information in free text.
public.form.optional: All questions are optional unless marked with an asterisk.
public.form.error.invalid: One of the answers is invalid. Please check the form.
public.form.error.too_long: One of the free-text answers is too long.
public.thanks.title: Thank you
public.limit.title: Feedback temporarily unavailable
public.limit.text: This free instance has reached its monthly submission safety limit. Please try again later.
analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Privacy-friendly campaign trends and response summaries.
analytics.utc_note: Days and range boundaries use UTC.
analytics.metadata.title: Optional coarse metadata
analytics.metadata.description: These summaries appear only for collection enabled in campaign privacy settings. They contain no raw user agents or full referrer URLs.
analytics.fields.title: Field summaries
analytics.fields.empty: No answerable fields or historical answers are available.
analytics.view_responses: View them in the response inbox.
export.title: Export submissions
export.warning: Exports may include free-text feedback. Do not share them publicly if people entered personal information.
retention.title: Data retention
retention.help: When enabled, data older than this period is eligible for manual hard deletion. No background job runs.
retention.invalid: Choose a valid retention period: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days.
retention.disabled: Retention is disabled. Data is kept until it is manually deleted.
retention.summary: Data older than %d days can be deleted now.
deletion.title: Danger zone
deletion.confirm_help: Permanent deletion cannot be undone. Enter the campaign slug “%s” when confirmation is requested.
deletion.confirmation_error: The campaign slug confirmation did not match.
instance.checklist.title: First-run checklist
instance.checklist.text: Review these basics before inviting people or sharing a public campaign.
instance.checklist.settings: Review registration and instance safety limits
instance.checklist.https: Put the instance behind HTTPS and enable secure cookies
landing.panel.title: What KoalaBye avoids
legal.placeholder_warning: This legal page is a placeholder for self-hosted or early test deployments. Replace it with legally reviewed text before running a public instance.
theme.label: Theme
